overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit commercial district. The player moves from a covered food court area with glowing stalls past palm-lined plazas and along a wide pedestrian boulevard lined with futuristic architecture and digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered food court with neon-lit stalls

events.description: camera passes close to a seated pedestrian at an outdoor dining table

agents.ego_description: walking through a covered plaza area with neon food stalls, observing the surroundings

notable_agents.action: man sitting at a round outdoor table near the JERK food stall

entered.detail: circular food stall with bright pink neon signage reading JERK and INSTANT CORNER
large suspended digital screens displaying CIRKUS and MIXED 16 advertisements
circular neon sign with Japanese characters and ramen bowl imagery
large illuminated wall display showing a muscular figure with text
round metal table with attached stools near the food stall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered commercial plaza dominated by the neon-pink JERK food stall. Overhead digital billboards display advertisements while a seated NPC rests at a nearby table. The ground is wet concrete reflecting the vibrant neon lights, and palm tree trunks are visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area between food court and open plaza

events.description: camera briefly looks down at litter and paper scattered on the wet ground
pedestrian in red shirt walks past the camera from right to left

agents.ego_description: continuing forward while briefly observing the ground litter, then passing a pedestrian

notable_agents.action: bald man in red shirt and white pants walking past the camera

entered.detail: pair of cylindrical trash receptacles with green lids and white bodies

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the food stall area, the camera briefly tilts down to reveal litter scattered on the reflective concrete. A pedestrian in a red shirt passes by closely on the left as the scene transitions toward a more open area with advertising displays.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with palm trees and digital advertising pillars

events.description: exits the covered area into an open plaza with visible sky and palm trees
ambient lighting shifts from pink/purple neon to green and yellow tones from storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking through an open plaza area lined with palm trees and digital displays

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the plaza with illuminated trunks
tall rectangular digital kiosk displaying car loan advertisements with 31.1% APR text
large building with geometric patterned facade and pink neon window lighting

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up into a spacious plaza with tall palm trees and a futuristic metro station visible in the distance. Digital advertising pillars display car commercials while the lighting shifts from pink neon to green and yellow hues. The camera moves steadily forward through this transitional space.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian boulevard with storefronts and benches

events.description: cars visible on adjacent street to the left, separated by barriers

agents.ego_description: continuing down a wide pedestrian street lined with shops and benches, approaching distant skyscrapers

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians seated on benches along the right side of the walkway

entered.detail: storefront with bright red neon signage reading CRICKET
concrete benches with seated NPCs lining the right side of the boulevard
large vertical screens displaying various advertisements on building facades
tall illuminated buildings with glass facades visible at the end of the street

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows a wide pedestrian boulevard lined with palm trees and outdoor benches where NPCs are seated. The CRICKET store with red neon signage is prominent on the left, while large vertical digital billboards illuminate the right side. The camera moves steadily toward distant futuristic skyscrapers with cars visible on an adjacent street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cramped, neon-pink food court into a wide, brightly lit futuristic boulevard. It begins under the glow of a JERK food stall and overhead digital billboards, moving across wet concrete that reflects the vibrant pink lights. As the camera passes a pedestrian in a red shirt and glides over scattered litter, the scene opens into a spacious plaza where the lighting shifts toward green and yellow hues beneath tall palm trees and a distant metro station. The view then expands further onto a wide pedestrian boulevard lined with outdoor benches and the red neon signage of a CRICKET store. Finally, the camera moves steadily forward past towering vertical billboards toward a skyline of distant futuristic skyscrapers and the lights of an adjacent street.
